# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  serverName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Administrator login name for the SQL Server
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for the SQL Server
  # Cost-optimized SKU parameters
  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
    metadata:
      description: SKU name for the database (Basic is cheapest)
  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
    metadata:
      description: SKU tier for the database
  maxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2147483648
    metadata:
      description: Max size of the database in bytes (default 2GB for Basic)
  # NOTE: Even for startups, consider enabling auditing. Removing it saves
  # minimal cost but significantly increases breach risk and may violate
  # data protection regulations (GDPR, CCPA, etc.)
  enableAuditingAndThreatProtection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: "WARNING: Disabling security features is not recommended. Enable when possible."

variables:
  serverResourceId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"

resources:
  # Azure SQL Server
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('serverName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
    tags:
      environment: startup
      cost-tier: basic
      security-review-needed: "true"

  # Azure SQL Database - Basic tier for cost savings
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('serverResourceId')]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local
    tags:
      environment: startup
      cost-tier: basic

  # Firewall rule to allow Azure services
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('serverResourceId')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  # Minimal connection policy
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('serverResourceId')]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Default

  # TDE - Transparent Data Encryption (free, always enable this)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

  # Short-term backup retention (free with Basic tier, 7 days default)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      retentionDays: 7

outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(variables('serverResourceId')).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
  connectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(variables('serverResourceId')).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Database=', parameters('databaseName'), ';Encrypt=true;TrustServerCertificate=false;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
  securityWarning:
    type: string
    value: "WARNING: Advanced Threat Protection and Auditing are disabled. Enable these features as soon as possible. TDE encryption-at-rest is enabled (free). Review security posture before storing any PII or sensitive customer data."
